briefing: Market is risk-off today with NASDAQ down 1.2% and S&P 500 down 0.4%, and the screener returned no candidates. Per strategy, we hold all six existing positions and keep the $677 cash dry — no forcing buys into a down tape. We wait for the next genuine risk-on signal before deploying.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-off' day is when investors broadly sell riskier assets like growth stocks and move toward safer havens such as bonds, gold, or cash. It typically happens when fear or uncertainty rises — bad economic news, rate hike fears, or geopolitical tension. On risk-off days, active strategies should avoid new buys and protect existing gains rather than chase falling prices.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「避險情緒」（Risk-Off）是指投資人普遍拋售成長股等風險較高的資產，轉而買入債券、黃金或持有現金等避風港。這種情況通常發生在市場不確定性升溫之際，例如經濟數據不如預期、加息預期升溫或地緣政治局勢緊張。在避險日，主動投資策略應避免建立新倉，並著重保護現有獲利，而非追入下跌的股票。

market_education.summary_en: Today's session saw broad risk-off selling as investors rotated out of equities, with growth-heavy NASDAQ bearing the brunt at -1.2% versus the more defensive S&P 500 at -0.4%. Risk-off days typically occur when macro uncertainty rises — through weak economic data, rate concerns, or geopolitical headlines — prompting traders to reduce exposure to higher-beta assets. The divergence between NASDAQ and S&P 500 signals that technology and growth stocks faced heavier selling than value and defensive sectors.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場呈現避險情緒，投資人普遍減持股票倉位，以科技股為主的那斯達克指數跌幅較重，達1.2%，而防禦性較強的標普500指數則相對抗跌，僅跌0.4%。每逢宏觀不確定性升溫——無論是經濟數據疲弱、利率預期轉向，抑或地緣政治風險——市場便會出現避險拋售，資金從高貝塔值的成長型資產流出。那斯達克與標普500之間的跌幅差距，正反映科技及成長股所承受的拋壓明顯大於價值股與防禦型板塊。
